entities.description: Wild barley (Hordeum spontaneum L.) used in the study

entities.name: GENOME WIDE ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify associations between genetic markers and phenotypic traits

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A phenotypic trait evaluated in the barley germplasm

entities.description: Phenotypic traits related to the physiological functions of the plant

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drought stress, a complex trait of interest

entities.name: SYRIA
entities.description: The country where phenotypic evaluations were conducted

entities.name: BREDA
entities.description: A specific study site in Syria characterized as dry

entities.name: DRY CONDITION
entities.description: Environmental condition at the Breda location

entities.name: WET CONDITION
entities.description: Environmental condition at the Tel Hadya location

entities.name: DART MARKERS
entities.description: Diversity array technology markers used for GWA analysis

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for GWA analysis

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Microsatellite or simple sequence repeat markers used for GWA analysis

entities.name: DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to group germplasm based on origin, structure, and domestication

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: LINKAGE MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify QTLs, compared against GWA analysis
